strategy_canvas.headline_thesis: Our line should break the cluster on SG data residency, PSG eligibility, and WhatsApp-first support — three axes where global incumbents cannot follow without rebuilding their go-to-market.

attack_plans.niche_name: Gen-2 family biz × PSG × SG localisation
attack_plans.icp: 20yr+ SG family-run SME, second-generation at the helm, making first AI/productivity investment
attack_plans.tam_reasoning: SG ACRA shows 18k active SMEs aged 20+ years in F&B/retail/trades; avg addressable spend S$1k/yr × 10-year adoption × 10% penetration.
attack_plans.why_gap: Heatmap shows 0 competitors serving this segment on PSG + SG local combined; incumbents aren't PSG-listed.
attack_plans.why_we_win: PSG-listed day one; founder-led WhatsApp matches the gen-2 operator's communication habit.

gtm.channel: ASME + SBF partnership events, Hokkien-speaking founder demo circuit
gtm.pitch: Your dad ran on paper. You run on WhatsApp. We run on the half-subsidised tool PSG pays for.
gtm.pricing: SME Team tier S$19/mo (S$9.50 post-PSG) for up to 10 seats
gtm.content: Case study: '3 gen-2 SMEs who retired Xero sheets'; Hokkien/Mandarin explainer videos

attack_plans.icp: Multi-branch dental/GP/physio groups in SG, 5–30 practitioners, MOH-licensed
attack_plans.tam_reasoning: SG has 2.1k clinics; addressable multi-branch subset ≈ 400; avg spend S$2k/yr × 80% penetration ceiling.
attack_plans.why_gap: PDPA + multi-branch coordination needs under-served; global tools don't speak 'clinical handover'.
attack_plans.why_we_win: SG residency + IMDA-aligned audit log addresses PDPA squarely.

gtm.channel: SMG (Singapore Medical Group) partnerships, dental-chain procurement leads
gtm.pitch: PDPA-compliant note workspace designed for clinical handover between branches.
gtm.pricing: Clinic tier S$65/mo per branch; enterprise contract at 5+ branches
gtm.content: Clinical-handover template library; PDPA checklist for clinics (gated)

attack_plans.icp: Legal / accounting / consulting partnerships, 10–50 staff, traditional sector
attack_plans.tam_reasoning: SG has 4.5k law/accounting firms; addressable mid-size subset ≈ 1,200; avg spend S$1.5k/yr × 60% penetration.
attack_plans.why_gap: Heatmap shows founder-led support near-zero for this segment; partners expect the CEO on WhatsApp.
attack_plans.why_we_win: Founder-led onboarding calls + direct WhatsApp line to engineering = decision-maker comfort.

gtm.channel: LawSoc, ICPAS mailing lists, partner-to-partner referral
gtm.pitch: Your managing partner gets the founder's mobile number. Global vendors give you a ticket queue.
gtm.pricing: Agency tier S$45/mo with first 3 months founder-led onboarding included
gtm.content: White paper on SRA rule-of-conduct compliance for digital notes
